title: Shopkeepers-reloaded
description: A french, free, open-source fork of the Shopkeepers plugin (https://github.com/Shopkeepers/Shopkeepers/)
body:
This plugin is a rewrited-version of the original [Shopkeepers](https://github.com/Shopkeepers/Shopkeepers/) plugin. Actually, some minor things changed :
- When we right-click a shopkeeper egg, it opens a GUI to select easly the shopkeeper type instead of having to click many times until finding the shopkeeper we wanted.
- Plugin has been translated to French (editable in config file)
- Some others things are coming... But that's all at the moment !

As the original plugin is under GNU v3.0 LICENSE, this forked version is also under that license and you can view the source code [here](https://github.com/arockenbauer/shopkeepers-reloaded).
